description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Grand Valley Stroganoff Pasta Skillet Dinner, featuring a prominent image of a prepared pasta dish on the front. The front panel displays the product name in large, bold letters, along with a blue Grand Valley logo and a note about no artificial flavors. The side panels provide nutritional facts and detailed cooking instructions, while the back panel lists the ingredients and allergen information in small print. The box is primarily colored in shades of cream, orange, and red, with photographic and graphic elements. The packaging is typical for dry pasta meal kits, designed to be easily stacked or shelved in urban grocery stores or pantries.
description: A rectangular cardboard box of Grand Valley Stroganoff Pasta Skillet Dinner, featuring a photo of the pasta dish and detailed product information on all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Grand Valley logo, product name, a large image of the prepared stroganoff, and key product highlights.
description_view_1: The left side displays the nutrition facts panel and some fine print, with a mostly orange background.
description_view_2: The back view contains the ingredients list, allergen warnings, and a QR code, all in small text.
description_view_3: The right side features cooking instructions, serving suggestions, and additional branding information.
attribute_labeling: Front: Grand Valley logo, Stroganoff Pasta Skillet Dinner, no artificial flavors, serving suggestion image. Sides: Nutrition facts, cooking instructions, serving suggestions, company information. Back: Ingredients, allergen information, QR code.
